_source: UC IPM (https://ipm.ucanr.edu/) — minimal demo table, expand per crop

Tomato___Late_blight.notes: Remove and destroy infected plants promptly

Potato___Late_blight.notes: Destroy infected foliage; hill soil over tubers

Pepper_bell___Bacterial_spot.notes: Use disease-free seed; avoid working plants when wet

weed.notes: Spot-treat only; mulch to suppress regrowth

aphids.notes: Spray undersides of leaves; repeat weekly

whitefly.notes: Treat early morning; monitor with traps

thrips.notes: Remove weeds nearby that host thrips
